title: Hadoop Ecosystem in a Big Data Use Case: Web Log Analysis
description: A flowchart illustrating the step-by-step process of using the Hadoop ecosystem to process and analyze large volumes of web server log data.
relationships: Data is ingested from web servers into HDFS for storage
MapReduce or Spark jobs are executed to clean and process the raw data
Processed data is queried using Hive or Pig for analysis
Aggregated results are served to a BI tool via HBase for final dashboard visualization
